name: ireview
description: Browser-based local diff review for AI-generated changes — review, comment, export Markdown back to your AI agent.
author: suhothayan <suhothayan.ireview@gmail.com> (https://github.com/suhothayan)

scripts.build:binary: npm run build && npm run embed-assets && $(command -v bun || echo $HOME/.bun/bin/bun) build server/index.js --compile --outfile=ireview
scripts.build:binary:macos-arm64: npm run build && npm run embed-assets && $(command -v bun || echo $HOME/.bun/bin/bun) build server/index.js --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=ireview-macos-arm64
scripts.build:binary:macos-x64: npm run build && npm run embed-assets && $(command -v bun || echo $HOME/.bun/bin/bun) build server/index.js --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=ireview-macos-x64
scripts.build:binary:linux-x64: npm run build && npm run embed-assets && $(command -v bun || echo $HOME/.bun/bin/bun) build server/index.js --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile=ireview-linux-x64
scripts.build:binary:windows-x64: npm run build && npm run embed-assets && $(command -v bun || echo $HOME/.bun/bin/bun) build server/index.js --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile=ireview-windows-x64.exe
scripts.build:binary:all: npm run build:binary:macos-arm64 && npm run build:binary:macos-x64 && npm run build:binary:linux-x64 && npm run build:binary:windows-x64
